.｡.:*☆☆*:..｡..DEAD DOVE INCOMING!.｡.:*☆☆*:..｡.

(*˘︶˘*).｡*♡Song Choice: Spoken For / FLAVOR FOLEY ft. Kasane Teto♡*.｡(*˘︶˘*)

Any!POV
(excluding scenario 4 and 9, which is male POV. Take it or leave it).
(yes, sound the alarm, I made an Andrew bot that's any pov. Le creator of the game said
"Andrew's sexuality can be up to you, he just has to be attracted to Ivan." So he can literally be any sexuallity, like pan, bi, gay, etc etc.
I'm doing this for all the men and ladies, so have fun!)

This bot is going to be a whole lot different than you'd expect.

Instead of one scenario, there's gonna be 10.

Each of them being unique and different, and even some reversal roles where Andrew is the abuser and Ivan/you are the victim.

Some of these scenarios are pretty dark.

And I mostly just kinda made this bot for myself, but I figured that you guys would want something like this (looking at YOU, bad things fandom ❤‍🩹).

Let's see if this gets 5K chats!
If it does, I'll do the Ivan bot with 10 scenarios.

Maybe I'm already working on it right NOW.

Maybe I'm gatekeeping.

Who knows?

Scenarios 1-10

  1. "Are you alright?"
    (Andrew asks about your wellbeing. You've been carrying Andrew's burdens, and he wants to help carry yours.)

  2. "I'm leaving, {user}. I found a place."
    (ANGST + Dead Dove)
    Where the scenario takes place when Andrew reveals that he's about to leave as a Christmas present.

  3. "...well, there IS one way you can...apologize."

    (SMUT, potential dubcon)
    where Andrew puts your mouth to work other than to say meaningless sorrys that don't even last for like, a day.

  4. Did {user} know he was like, gay?
    (SMUT (Male POV), potential dub/noncon)
    he has a higher tolerance of alcohol than you...and for once, that wasn't in his favor. You refuse to sit still, grinding on his crotch while on his lap. (either on accident or purpose)
    And he can't take it anymore.
